text: Standing in this sleek, glass-walled corridor, I sense an atmosphere of curiosity and purpose. People on the other side of the glass talk and move quietly, each absorbed in their own intellectual pursuits. Moving into the bold, colorful R+D space, my mind awakens further. The words on the wall invite me into a dialogue—between research and wonder, the mundane and the profound. Here, I feel simultaneously energized and contemplative, both observer and participant in an unfolding exploration of knowledge and meaning.
